title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Health Products for Women (SAC-HPW): Agenda November 22, 2022 - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Health Products for Women (SAC-HPW): Agenda November 22, 2022
Date and Time: November 22, 2022, 12:30-4:30 pm EST Location: via Zoom Chair: Lorraine Greaves (Chair), Louise Pilote (Vice-chair) Secretariat: Centre for Policy, Pediatrics and International Collaboration Participants: SAC-HPW members, Health Canada employees
12:30-12:35 Welcome and Opening Remarks Chief Medical Advisor, Health Canada and Senior Medical Advisor for Health Products and Food Branch (HPFB)
12:35-12:45 Chair's Address, Introduction of Members, Review of Affiliations and Interests (A&I), Review of Agenda Chair
12:45-12:50 Observership by Health Technology Assessment Organizations CADTH and INESSS Medical Devices Directorate (MDD)
12:50-1:20 Session #1: Updates and Discussion on past SAC-HPW Recommendations to the Health Products and Food Branch Centre for Policy, Paediatrics and International Collaboration (CCPIC)
1:20-1:40 Session #2: Overview of Risk Management Plans (RMP) in Canada - Managing the Risk of Teratogenicity Marketed Pharmaceuticals Bureau, Marketed Health Products Directorate (MHPD)
1:40-2:10 Session #2: Committee Discussions and Feedback SAC-HPW members
2:10-2:40 Session #3: Monitoring the safety of COVID-19 vaccines in women Bureau of Biologics, Radiopharmaceuticals and Self-Care Products, MHPD
2:40-3:10 Session #3: Committee Discussions and Feedback SAC-HPW members
3:10-3:40 Session #4: Update on HPFB's SGBA Plus Action Plan CCPIC
3:40-4:10 Session #4: Committee Discussions and Feedback SAC-HPW members
4:10-4:20 Secretariat updates SAC-HPW Secretariat
4:20-4:25 Closing and Adjournment of Meeting Chair
4:25-4:30 In-camera Session SAC-HPW members only
